counters.description: one of the real counters to you! disengage if she hits e or uses r post 6. try to dodge her skills and all in if she misses e. consider to rush steelcaps.
she scales hard and out sustain you. dont duel with her, seek opportunities on other lanes. hug wall when she uses her ulti.
you can win if he is bad. if he is not jayce always wins. consider to rush steelcaps.
easy lane at the early stage if you can escape his rupture. but eventually he outscales you. so farm up and roam. consider to rush mercs.
everything depends timing to use her w. don't stand close to walls. e her 2.qs or her e.
you can kill him pre 6, but cant after 6. its a farm lane. look opportunities on other lanes.
pre-6 you have a chance but after 6 he out-sustain you. farm up and ask gank for your jungler or look roam opportunities. consider to rush steelcaps.
if he is tank its farm lane. if he is ap, you are good. try to abuse early.
dont extend your trades. harrass, go in, make a combo then go out.

patience and farming lane. pre-9, his w only lasts few seconds and its his primary damage. so, if he use his w, you can use your shield for invincibility and then engage. but watch out of his passive.
oranges set him free, so you cannot perform full combo. try to farm as much as you can. try to trade him with your q.
try to dodge his abilities. dont fight with him when his ulti is up!
respect lvl1-2. try to poke and get a lead pre-6.  consider to rush steelcaps.
